event_claims.description: Agreement and Plan of Merger dated as of December 14, 2014 by and among the Company, Argos Holdings Inc. and Argos Merger Sub Inc.
event_claims.quote_text: Agreement and Plan of Merger (as it may be amended from time to time, the “merger agreement”), dated as of December 14, 2014, by and among the Company, Argos Holdings Inc., a Delaware corporation (“Parent”), and Argos Merger Sub Inc., a Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of Parent (“Merger Sub”)

event_claims.description: Merger Sub will be merged with and into the Company under the merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: Under the merger agreement, Merger Sub will be merged with and into the Company (the “merger”)
